# SRC043 - Meta Aims to Fully Automate Advertising with AI by 2026

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform AI |
| Authors / source | Reuters / WSJ report |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | News report |
| Quality | Medium-High |
| URL | [https://www.reuters.com/business/media-telecom/meta-aims-fully-automate-advertising-with-ai-by-2026-wsj-reports-2025-06-02/](https://www.reuters.com/business/media-telecom/meta-aims-fully-automate-advertising-with-ai-by-2026-wsj-reports-2025-06-02/) |

## Bias / limitation

News based on reported plan; not API documentation.

## Core takeaway

Major platforms are moving toward fuller AI ad automation.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use as market-direction evidence, not as a current implementation spec.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

